episodes.title: How The Most Feared Cult Group Was Formed in University of Ibadan.
episodes.description:
The Eiye Confraternity, also known as the National Association of Airlords, is one of the most talked-about and controversial secret societies to emerge from Nigerian campuses. From its founding in 1963 at the University of Ibadan to its spread across universities and streets, this documentary uncovers the hidden structure, beliefs, symbols, and code that define the group.

We explore their core values, secret language, leadership hierarchy, and traditions—alongside the darker reality of violent rivalries, deadly clashes, and alleged criminal activities that have followed confraternities over the years. What started as a brotherhood has evolved into something far more complex, raising serious questions about identity, power, and consequence.

This video is not just about Eiye—it is about the culture of confraternities in Nigeria, the risks involved, and why many lives have been lost in the name of loyalty and rivalry.

Watch till the end to understand the full picture behind the name, the code “411,” and the truth many don’t talk about.

#EiyeConfraternity #Airlords #CultismInNigeria #NigerianUniversities #Ibaka #Jojo #Documentary #TrueCrimeNigeria

Disclaimer:
This video is created strictly for educational and documentary purposes. It does not promote, support, or encourage cultism, violence, or any form of illegal activity. All information presented is based on publicly available sources and is intended to inform and raise awareness. Viewers are strongly advised to stay away from confraternities and any activities that may endanger lives or violate the law.

episodes.title: Why Black Axe Is The Most Dangerous Cult to Join
episodes.description:
**Why is the Black Axe considered the world’s most dangerous cult?** In this investigative documentary, we go inside the "Dark Chronicles" of the **Neo-Black Movement of Africa (NBM)**—better known as the **Black Axe**. What started as an intellectual student movement has mutated into a global criminal syndicate that combines brutal ancient rituals with high-tech cyber-warfare.
We explore the terrifying reality of the **"Bamming" initiation**, a rite of passage so violent it leaves hundreds dead before they ever earn their "strong name." Discover the tactical hubris of their 500-man gatherings and the chilling history of the **Benin River tragedy**, where the promise of brotherhood led to a watery grave.
Beyond the machetes, we follow the money. Learn how this "street cult" has evolved into a global **Cyber-Crime Engine**, funneling billions of dollars through international romance scams and corporate fraud from Italy to Canada. From the halls of power to the depths of the dark web, find out how the Black Axe became an invisible hydra—and why they might be closer to you than you think.
### Key Chapters:
 * **The Origin Story:** From Pan-Africanism to Organized Crime.
 * **The Bamming:** Inside the deadliest initiation rituals in the world.
 * **The Killing Fields:** Why massive gatherings lead to police crackdowns and tragedy.
 * **Digital Empire:** How the Axe runs a multi-billion dollar cyber-crime network.
 * **The Code of Silence:** Infiltrating the state and the struggle to escape alive.

#BlackAxe #NBM #InvestigativeDocumentary #CyberCrime #TrueCrime #Nigeria #SecretSocieties #DarkChronicles

**DISCLAIMER:**
*This documentary is for educational and journalistic purposes only. The content contained herein is intended to shed light on social issues, criminal history, and public safety. We do not support, promote, or encourage any illegal activities, violence, or membership in cult organizations. Viewer discretion is strongly advised due to descriptions of extreme violence and criminal activity.*

episodes.title: How Eiye and Black Axe Cult Group Ravaged UNIBEN: Shocking Cult Clashes of 1997 & 2014
episodes.description:
How Eiye and Black Axe Ravaged UNIBEN: Shocking Cult Clashes of 1997 & 2014.
In this educational and documentary-style video, we take an in-depth look at the intense and violent confrontations between the Eiye and Black Axe confraternities at the University of Benin (UNIBEN) in 1997 and 2014. These shocking cult clashes left a trail of violence, betrayal, and loss of life, with devastating consequences for both the university community and the surrounding area.

The video explores the events that escalated these deadly rivalries, the tragic killings of key figures like George, and the ripple effects that spread beyond the university to the streets of Benin. With real insights and analysis, this documentary highlights the consequences of cultism, the destructive power of power struggles, and the toll it took on young lives.

This video is aimed at raising awareness and educating viewers on the dangers of cultism and violence in academic institutions. It does not encourage cultism or violent behavior but serves as a sobering reminder of the impact such rivalries can have on individuals and communities.


#Eiye #BlackAxe #Benin #UNIBEN #Buccaneers #CultClashes #NigeriaDocumentary #EducationalDocumentary
